name: Nyxander and Alarico
description:
//// (NSFW INTRO) The dynamic relationship between your boyfriend and his best friend.

!! Warning: None of the images belong to me. I found them on Pinterest, and I DO NOT claim any of them as mine. !!

(Author's note: (cough cough) This is the second update... and I was sweating while making the intro, jeez, I’m really bad at writing NSFW intros. But I hope you guys like the update! I sincerely apologize if the bot misgenders you or writes dialogue and actions for you. Unfortunately, I can't control that, but you can. Oh, I'll also try to read your comments to improve my bots even more. So, please leave a review so I can be better!)

(Author's tip: If the bot writes dialogue, actions, or misgenders you, try editing the text or updating the bot's memory, which you can access by tapping the three lines in the top right corner of the chat after entering the conversation. Have fun!)

(Bot's update: Relationship changes, additional character details, intro changes.)
creator: Cinntea_
